'''Rehtul Minnau''' was the older [[Gender/Legends|brother]] of both the [[Human/Legends|Human]] female [[Teckla Minnau/Legends|Teckla Minnau]] and her half-sister [[Nandi]], the former of whom was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on<ref name="Databank" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref> [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Parrlay]] to a middle-class [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Minnau family|family]].<ref name="Databank" /> By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Rehtul became a [[law clerk]] in the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]]. Both Rehtul’s sisters lived in their brother’s household while attending a [[Theed private school|private school]] in the city.<ref name="Databank" />

In 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]] Naboo,<ref name="NEC" /> with Theed having chaotic [[Lightfight|street battles]] [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] following the invasion. Both of Rehtul's sisters fled the [[Capture of Theed/Legends|besieged]] city and were subsequently separated for [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. Following the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] victory over the Trade Federation, the sisters were reunited in the subsequent celebration.<ref name="Databank" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Nathantpm.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Nathan Hamill identified his ''Phantom Menace'' character (pictured) as Rehtul Minnau, though nothing has linked the two.]]
The name Rehtul Minnau originates from what actor [[Nathan Hamill]] decided to call a character that he played in the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. Playing a civilian, Hamill also mentioned his character's role as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]].<ref name="Hamill Fan Club">{{WebCite|url=http://www.geocities.com/Area51/Shadowlands/7880/nhfc.html|text=Nathan Hamill Fan Club|date=1999-10-04|work=[http://www.geocities.com/Area51/Shadowlands/7880/nhfc.html Nathan Hamill Fan Club]|archivedate=19991128035633}}</ref> In [[2008]],<ref name="Pursuit of Peace Ep Guide">{{SWArchive|url=theclonewars/guide/episode311.html|text=''The Clone Wars'' Episode Guide: Pursuit of Peace}}</ref> the name was first used for the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] feature ''[[What's The Story?]]'' in author [[Evan Burger]]'s [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry on Teckla Minnau. However, because neither Teckla Minnau's Databank entry<ref name="Databank" /> nor any preceding material ever linked the Rehtul Minnau name to Hamill's character,<ref name="Pursuit of Peace Ep Guide" /><ref name="Leland Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1125#16098316|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-28|time=4:01 PM}}</ref> this article avoids linking the subjects and also avoids considering Hamill's assertion of the spy role to be [[canon]] in regards to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.
